questions.question: What is a life cycle?
questions.questionThai: วัฏจักรชีวิตคืออะไร?
options: The stages a living thing goes through from birth to death
questions.explanation: A life cycle is the series of stages that a living thing goes through from birth to death and reproduction.

questions.question: What does a seed need to start growing?
questions.questionThai: เมล็ดต้องการอะไรเพื่อเริ่มเติบโต?
questions.explanation: Seeds need water, warmth, and air to germinate and start growing.

questions.question: What is the first part of a plant to grow from a seed?
questions.questionThai: ส่วนแรกของพืชที่เติบโตจากเมล็ดคืออะไร?
questions.explanation: The root is the first part to grow from a seed. It grows downward into the soil to absorb water.

questions.question: What is a young plant called after it sprouts from a seed?
questions.questionThai: พืชต้นเล็กที่งอกจากเมล็ดเรียกว่าอะไร?
questions.explanation: A young plant that has just sprouted from a seed is called a seedling.

questions.question: Which part of a plant makes seeds?
questions.questionThai: ส่วนใดของพืชที่สร้างเมล็ด?
questions.explanation: Flowers are the part of plants that make seeds through the process of pollination.

questions.question: What is germination?
questions.questionThai: การงอกคืออะไร?
options: When a seed begins to grow
questions.explanation: Germination is when a seed begins to grow and a new plant starts to develop.

questions.question: What does the root do for a plant?
questions.questionThai: รากทำหน้าที่อะไรสำหรับพืช?
options: Absorbs water and anchors the plant
questions.explanation: Roots absorb water and nutrients from the soil and anchor the plant in place.

questions.question: What is inside a seed?
questions.questionThai: มีอะไรอยู่ภายในเมล็ด?
options: A tiny baby plant and stored food
questions.explanation: Inside a seed is a tiny baby plant (embryo) and stored food to help it start growing.

questions.question: What is pollination?
questions.questionThai: การผสมเกสรคืออะไร?
options: When pollen moves from one flower to another
questions.explanation: Pollination is when pollen moves from the stamen of one flower to the pistil of another, which helps make seeds.

questions.question: Which animals help with pollination?
questions.questionThai: สัตว์ชนิดใดช่วยในการผสมเกสร?
questions.explanation: Bees, butterflies, and birds are pollinators that carry pollen between flowers when they visit them for nectar.

questions.question: What happens AFTER a flower is pollinated?
questions.questionThai: เกิดอะไรขึ้นหลังจากดอกไม้ได้รับการผสมเกสร?
questions.explanation: After pollination, seeds begin to form inside the flower, and a fruit may develop around them.

questions.question: Why do plants make fruits?
questions.questionThai: ทำไมพืชถึงสร้างผลไม้?
options: To protect seeds and help them spread
questions.explanation: Fruits protect seeds and help them spread to new places through wind, water, or animals eating them.

questions.question: Which of these is a way seeds can spread to new places?
questions.questionThai: ข้อใดต่อไปนี้เป็นวิธีที่เมล็ดสามารถแพร่กระจายไปยังที่ใหม่?
questions.explanation: Seeds spread through wind (like dandelions), water (like coconuts), and animals (like berries).

questions.question: What do plants need to make their own food?
questions.questionThai: พืชต้องการอะไรในการสร้างอาหารของตัวเอง?
questions.explanation: Plants make food through photosynthesis using sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide from the air.

questions.question: What is pollen?
questions.questionThai: ละอองเกสรคืออะไร?
options: Yellow powder in flowers needed to make seeds
questions.explanation: Pollen is a yellow powder found in flowers that is necessary for making seeds.

questions.question: In the reading passage, what did Noi plant?
questions.questionThai: ในบทอ่าน น้อยปลูกอะไร?
questions.explanation: In the reading passage, Noi planted sunflower seeds that her grandmother gave her.

questions.question: Why does the plant life cycle never really end?
questions.questionThai: ทำไมวัฏจักรชีวิตของพืชไม่เคยสิ้นสุดจริงๆ?
options: Because seeds from one plant grow into new plants that make more seeds
questions.explanation: The life cycle continues because plants make seeds, and those seeds grow into new plants that make more seeds, repeating the cycle.

questions.question: What is the correct order of the plant life cycle?
questions.questionThai: ลำดับที่ถูกต้องของวัฏจักรชีวิตพืชคืออะไร?
options: Seed, germination, seedling, adult plant, flower
questions.explanation: The correct order is: seed, germination (sprouting), seedling, adult plant, then flower (which makes new seeds).

questions.question: Why do different plants take different amounts of time to become adults?
questions.questionThai: ทำไมพืชต่างชนิดใช้เวลาต่างกันในการเป็นต้นโตเต็มวัย?
options: Because different species have different growth rates and life spans
Because all plants grow at the same speed
questions.explanation: Different species have different growth rates - a bean plant may mature in weeks, while an oak tree takes many years.

questions.question: How do seeds benefit from being inside fruits?
questions.questionThai: เมล็ดได้ประโยชน์อย่างไรจากการอยู่ภายในผลไม้?
options: Fruits protect seeds and animals spread them when they eat the fruit
questions.explanation: Fruits protect seeds from damage and help spread them when animals eat the fruit and deposit the seeds elsewhere through their droppings.
